title: Tramontina 5L Pedal Bin – Stainless Steel Bathroom Bin with Lid, 20.5 cm Diameter x 29 cm Height, 94538105
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: PERFECT FOR COMPACT SPACES: This 5l small pedal bin is perfect for guest bathrooms, bedrooms, or under-sink use. A discreet and stylish small bin for managing everyday waste in tight spaces.

DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL: Made from polished stainless steel, this bathroom bin with lid is designed for daily use. A sturdy handle makes it easy to carry and ideal for small bathrooms or ensuite spaces.
HANDS-FREE MECHANISM: This small bathroom bin features a smooth foot pedal for hygienic, hands-free operation. The lid helps contain odours, making it a great choice for any bathroom or toilet space.
STAY-OPEN LID: This pedal bin features a stay-open lid for longer tasks like cleaning or changing liners, while the smooth interior makes it easy to wipe clean.

NON-SLIP BASE AND COMPACT DESIGN: The non-slip base keeps the bin stable on hard floors. Whether used as an under sink bin, waste paper bin or compact bathroom bin, it’s built for everyday convenience.
description: Product Description Tramontina 5L Pedal Bin – Compact Stainless Steel Bin with Lid for Bathrooms and Small Spaces The Tramontina 3-litre small bin is a discreet and practical choice for waste disposal in guest bathrooms, under sinks, bedrooms, or other compact spaces. Its sleek stainless steel design and compact size make it a stylish addition to modern interiors. This small pedal bin is made from corrosion-resistant stainless steel and features a reliable foot pedal for hands-free operation. The secure-fit lid helps contain odours, making it ideal as a small bathroom bin. Designed for convenience, this compact bin features a stay-open lid that is ideal for clean-ups or changing liners. The smooth stainless steel interior is easy to wipe clean, helping you maintain a hygienic space with minimal effort. A non-slip base keeps the bin stable on hard floors, while the built-in handle makes it easy to move around. Whether used as a waste paper bin, under sink bin, or compact bathroom bin, Tramontina’s 3L bin delivers reliable performance in a space-saving design. KEY FEATURES Size: 5 Litre Dimension: Ø 20.5 cm x 29 cm height Recommended bin liner: 5.0l Material: AISI 430 polished stainless steel Pedal touch Handle: Stainless steel Non-slip base Made in Brazil Tramontina 3 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 5 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 12 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 20 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 30 Litre Pedal Bin Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,402 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,402 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,402 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,402 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,402 Price £18.99 £ 18 . 99 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £33.99 £ 33 . 99 £41.99 £ 41 . 99 Capacity 3.0l 5.0l 12.0l 20.0l 30.0l Diameter Ø 17 cm Ø 20.5 cm Ø 25.5 cm Ø 29.5 cm Ø 29.5 cm Height 27 cm 29 cm 40 cm 46 cm 65.5 cm Recommended bin liner 3.0l 5.0l 10 - 12l 20 - 30l 20 - 30l Removable bucket No No ✓ ✓ ✓ Product weight 0.84 kg 1.11 kg 1.97 kg 2.63 kg 3.65 kg Non-slip base ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Quality products since 1911 Founded in 1911, Tramontina started as a small iron mill in southern Brazil. The company currently has one of the largest industrial parks in Brazil with 10 factories aimed in the most varied segments – cookware, tableware, knives, barbecue grill accessories, stainless steel utensils. Tramontina has a strong presence in Brazil and has reached over 120 countries. In total, there are 15 units abroad, including a distribution center in UK. Along with the renowned dishwasher safe steak knives, Tramontina is now including some new additions to the portfolio, as coffee and tea glasses, roasting pans, kitchen utensils sets, stainless steel cookware and cutlery.
